items.title: That's it.
items.description: That's it. Point it at a channel, give it a task, and let it work. It's in beta on Slack today for Claude Enterprise and Team customers. More surfaces coming soon! Learn more: https://t.co/tcvNSCANlf
items.description_zh: 就是这样。将其指向一个频道，给它一个任务，然后让它工作。今天，它在 Slack 上为 Claude Enterprise 和 Team 客户提供测试版。更多表面即将推出！了解更多：https://t.co/tcvNSCANlf

items.title: Tag Claude in a channel, it spins up an instance with its own sandbox.
items.title_zh: 在通道中标记 Claude，它会使用自己的沙箱启动一个实例。
items.description: Tag Claude in a channel, it spins up an instance with its own sandbox. It clones repos, writes code, tests, compiles all in that isolated environment and the sandbox gets thrown away when it's done. One instance per thread, its own memory…
items.description_zh: 在通道中标记 Claude，它会使用自己的沙箱启动一个实例。它在隔离环境中克隆存储库、编写代码、测试、编译所有内容，完成后沙箱将被丢弃。每个线程一个实例，有自己的内存......

items.title: I also have Claude monitoring Slack channels to proactively respond to people to answer t…
items.title_zh: 我还让 Claude 监控 Slack 频道，主动回复人们的问题……
items.description: I also have Claude monitoring Slack channels to proactively respond to people to answer their questions and draft PRs, and to react with specific emojis like ✅❌ when a thread is resolved. To set it up, just add @.Claude to a channel and as…
items.description_zh: 我还让 Claude 监控 Slack 频道，主动回复人们，回答他们的问题并起草 PR，并在话题解决后使用特定的表情符号（如 ✅❌）做出反应。要进行设置，只需将 @.Claude 添加到频道并作为...
